findings.message: The process map says the emitted dispatch packet includes domain, but TrialDispatchPacket / dispatch.v2 do not carry that field. domain exists upstream on ArtifactDeltaEvent and in the persisted queue format, so the current data-flow description is inaccurate and can misplace where domain enforcement actually belongs.

The telemetry analysis is incorrect about rejection observability. Current queue telemetry uses a single kind: validation_rejected for all validation failures and stores the specific cause in reason; new guard reasons do not require new telemetry kind values.

The noise breakdown table is presented as if the categories are disjoint, but the listed counts sum to 291 against only 160 total noise dispatches. Without explicitly marking these buckets as overlapping, the document overstates the independent catch volume of the proposed rules.
